ticket.title: Hybrid retrieval observability + cost telemetry
ticket.description: Once KB-first retrieval is live, instrument it: KB hit rate, fallback rate, freshness misses, writeback yield, and cost-per-retrieve vs cost-per-scrape - to prove the investment and tune freshness thresholds.

candidate_memory.link_reason: the module that gains the metrics

code_agent.rationale: code_agent keeps the in-scope codebase/decision/project context; agent_run/workspace is out of scope, rejected entries are withheld, local notes are private; 'Credit system terms' is in scope but tangential here (optional).

qa_agent.rationale: qa_agent keeps the in-scope codebase/decision context; agent_run/project/workspace is out of scope, rejected entries are withheld, local notes are private.

design_agent.rationale: design_agent keeps the in-scope decision/project context; agent_run/codebase is out of scope, rejected entries are withheld, local notes are private; 'Credit system terms', 'CONVENTIONS.md — input revalidation (Convention 9)' are in scope but tangential here (optional).

product_agent.rationale: product_agent keeps the in-scope decision/project context; agent_run/codebase is out of scope, rejected entries are withheld, local notes are private; 'CONVENTIONS.md — input revalidation (Convention 9)' is in scope but tangential here (optional).

human_teammate.rationale: Robin (the baseline owner) sees the current team entries; another actor's local note stays on its owner's device.
